abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} a foe to knock them back, stun them, or put them off balance, take +2 momentum on a hit. On a strong hit, you also create an opening and add +1 on your next move.
When you make a move by making a showy display of your hammer or by intimidating with it, reroll any dice and take +1 momentum on a hit.

Once per fight, when you are in a bad spot, you may risk it all by wresting control of the encounter from your foe and @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} with all the fury and power you can muster. If you do [decide before rolling], you may reroll any dice and mark progress on a strong hit, but count a weak hit as a miss.
